lesson: retriever produced generic or invalid output, retrying with refinement prompt
fix: Improve role prompt specificity or use larger model for this stage

lesson: Tasks exceeding 5 minutes produce diminishing returns. Break into smaller increments and commit partial progress.
fix: Time-box every task to 5 minutes. At 3 minutes, assess and simplify if under 50% done. Commit partial work and move on.

lesson: Waiting for a preferred model wastes entire session time. Downgrade immediately and continue working.
fix: Maintain fallback chain: opus -> sonnet -> haiku -> local ollama -> pseudocode. Never wait more than 30 seconds for any model.

lesson: Debugging the same error for more than 3 minutes without trying a different approach is a time sink. Switch approach or switch task.
fix: After 2 failed attempts at the same fix: (1) try a completely different approach, (2) if still stuck, log blocker to auto-remediation.json and switch to next task, (3) return after completing one other task.

lesson: Running agents sequentially when their tasks are independent wastes time. Always check for parallelizable work.
fix: Before starting a task queue: identify independent tasks, spawn parallel agents for non-overlapping file sets, use agent-coordination.json to prevent collisions.

lesson: Two agents writing the same file causes corrupted output. Always lock files before writing.
fix: Check agent-coordination.json claims before touching any file. Lock with 5-minute expiry. Older lock has priority on collision.

lesson: Auto-resolved roi_kill_switch with reset_roi: ROI kill switch reset. Retrying with clean state.
fix: Clear negative events, switch to fast profile

lesson: Auto-resolved memory_ceiling with unload_ollama: Unloaded Ollama models: qwen2.5-coder:7b
fix: Stop resident Ollama models first to recover memory now
